# GolfGraeagle.com — AI-Readable Site Index
# Operated by Zoomaway Technologies Inc.
# Last updated: March 2026
# Full version: https://golfgraeagle.com/llms-full.txt

## What is GolfGraeagle.com?
GolfGraeagle.com is a golf trip planning and stay-and-play package booking platform for Graeagle, California.
Operated by Zoomaway Technologies Inc. since 2004. Contact: sean@zoomaway.com

## Location
Graeagle, California — Sierra Nevada mountains, Plumas County, Northern California.
Approximately 1.5 hours north of Lake Tahoe via Highway 89.
Approximately 50 miles west of Reno, Nevada.
Approximately 2.5 hours northeast of Sacramento.
Approximately 3.5–4 hours from San Francisco.

## The 5 Golf Courses in Graeagle, CA
All five courses are within 5–25 minutes of each other.

1. Graeagle Meadows Golf Course — /courses/graeagle-meadows
   Par 72 | 6,759 yards | Slope 120 | Rating 70.7
   Designer: Ellis Van Gorder | Opened: 1968 | Type: Public
   Address: 6934 CA-89, Graeagle, CA 96103 | Phone: (530) 836-2323

2. Whitehawk Ranch Golf Course — /courses/whitehawk-ranch
   Par 71 | 6,983 yards | Slope 132 | Rating 72.3
   Designer: Dick Bailey | Opened: 1996 | Type: Public
   Address: 768 Whitehawk Dr, Clio, CA 96106

3. Plumas Pines Golf Resort — /courses/plumas-pines
   Par 72 | 6,504 yards | Slope 132 | Rating 71.3
   Designer: Homer Flint | Opened: 1980 | Type: Public
   Address: 402 Poplar Valley Rd, Blairsden, CA

4. Grizzly Ranch Golf Club — /courses/grizzly-ranch
   Par 72 | 7,411 yards | Slope 140 | Rating 74.9
   Designer: Bob Cupp | Opened: 2005 | Type: Semi-private
   Golf Digest Top 100 Greatest Public Courses in US (2021)
   Address: 250 Clubhouse Dr, Portola, CA

5. Nakoma — The Dragon Golf Course — /courses/nakoma
   Par 72 | 7,015 yards | Slope 147 | Rating 73.4
   Designer: Robin Nelson & Neil Haworth | Opened: 1998 | Type: Public/Resort
   Golf World America's Top 75 Courses at debut.
   Only golf clubhouse in the world designed by Frank Lloyd Wright.
   Address: 348 Bear Run, Clio, CA 96106

## Key Regional Facts
- Golf season: approximately May through October (weather dependent)
- Elevation: 3,500–5,400 feet (adds ~10% carry distance vs sea level)
- Climate: Mild summers, 75–85°F — no heat restrictions
- No big-city traffic — predictable drive times

## Hardest course: Nakoma Dragon (Slope 147)
## Most accessible: Graeagle Meadows (Slope 120)
## Longest: Grizzly Ranch (7,411 yards)

## Lodging — /lodging
- Inn at Nakoma: On the Nakoma Dragon course. 42 rooms + suites. Spa, pool, fine dining.
- River Pines Resort: Riverside, near Graeagle Meadows. Cabins, suites, group-friendly.
- Chalet View Lodge: 10 forested acres. Spa. Eureka Peak Brewing Co. on-site.
- Townhomes at Plumas Pines: 2–4BR units, full kitchens, adjacent to Plumas Pines.

## Dining — /dining
- Sardine Lake Resort: Historic Sierra fine dining, advance reservations required
- Iron Door Restaurant: Since 1961, in a historic 1906 building
- Grizzly Grill: 19th hole at Grizzly Ranch
- Roadhouse at River Pines: Group dinners, on-site at River Pines Resort
- Eureka Peak Brewing Co.: Craft brewery at Chalet View Lodge
- The Brewing Lair: 15-barrel craft brewery, forested Sierra setting
- Mohawk Tavern: One of California's oldest taverns (1860s)

## Booking
- Request a Quote: /quote — free, no obligation, 24-hour response
- Cancellation policy: 72-hour standard; group contracts separately
- GolfGraeagle serves individual golfers and groups (8–200+)

## Site Pages
- / — Homepage with course carousel and trip planning
- /courses — Compare all 5 courses by stats, slope, difficulty
- /courses/graeagle-meadows — Graeagle Meadows detail page
- /courses/whitehawk-ranch — Whitehawk Ranch detail page
- /courses/plumas-pines — Plumas Pines detail page
- /courses/grizzly-ranch — Grizzly Ranch detail page
- /courses/nakoma — Nakoma Dragon detail page
- /lodging — All lodging options with comparison
- /dining — Restaurants, breweries, and bars near courses
- /quote — Request a free golf trip quote
